'''shavaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jocularism|jocularism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jocularism|jocularism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shavaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shævæzæth|shævæzæth]] || [[word:shævæzæj|shævæzæj]] || [[word:shævæzæsh|shævæzæsh]] || [[word:shævæzæ|shævæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavavazath|shavavazath]] || [[word:shavavazaj|shavavazaj]] || [[word:shavavazash|shavavazash]] || [[word:shavavaza|shavavaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavazath|shavazath]] || [[word:shavazaj|shavazaj]] || [[word:shavazash|shavazash]] || [[word:shavaza|shavaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavafzath|shavafzath]] || [[word:shavafzaj|shavafzaj]] || [[word:shavafzash|shavafzash]] || [[word:shavafzaf|shavafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shavazatha|shavazatha]] || [[word:shavazaja|shavazaja]] || [[word:shavazasha|shavazasha]] || [[word:shavazaka|shavazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shavazath|shavazath]] || [[word:shavazaj|shavazaj]] || [[word:shavazash|shavazash]] || [[word:shavaza|shavaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shavazathal|shavazathal]] || [[word:shavazajal|shavazajal]] || [[word:shavazashal|shavazashal]] || [[word:shavazakal|shavazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shavazathatha|shavazathatha]] || [[word:shavazajaja|shavazajaja]] || [[word:shavazashasha|shavazashasha]] || [[word:shavazaka|shavazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shavazathan|shavazathan]] || [[word:shavazajan|shavazajan]] || [[word:shavazashan|shavazashan]] || [[word:shavazakan|shavazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shavazathaoro|shavazathaoro]] || [[word:shavazajaoro|shavazajaoro]] || [[word:shavazashaoro|shavazashaoro]] || [[word:shavazakaoro|shavazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
